title: App Features Not Able to Be Copied!
excerpt: Our boards contain a lot of custom information and intellectual property-- it’s not necessarily the automations themselves but the content and the “system” and how it works.  We want to be able to sell the system without…

posts.author: ingridw (Ingrid Wulczyn)
posts.cookedHtml: Our boards contain a lot of custom information and intellectual property-- it’s not necessarily the automations themselves but the content and the “system” and how it works. We want to be able to sell the system without having folks just copy it once they have access. I’d like to propose templates and apps where the contents can not be copied. Please vote!
